narrative.headline: 2022 Mazda Mazda3: air bag warnings dominate the complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 23 complaints with NHTSA. Air bags are by far the most reported area at 52%, more than triple the next area, the electrical system (17%). Structure, engine, and power train each account for 9%. No fires and no deaths are reported. One crash and two injuries are tied to the air bag complaints.

issues.sample: Purchased vehicle new at dealership April 15th 2022 w/ 17 miles on the odometer. After 500 miles on the odometer, began receiving multiple daily warnings through the MyMazda app indicating airbag/seat belt pretensioner malfunction. Subsequently noticed the same warning lit up on
issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint by far: 12 reports (52%), tied to 1 crash and 2 injuries. Owners describe repeated airbag and seat-belt pretensioner malfunction warnings. Confirm no warning lights stay on.

issues.sample: The same or similar issue is described here: https://static.nhtsa.gov/odi/tsbs/2022/MC-10209787-0001.pdf  Essentially, this issue has to do with the wiring under the seat that is responsible for airbag functioning. Adjusting the seat caused "Airbag Malfunctioning" alarm/notificat
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 4 reports (17%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Reports point to wiring under the seat that ties back to airbag warnings.

issues.sample: Constant rattling after only 2,000 miles. Sounds like it’s coming from behind the glove box. Another constant rattle from the head up display.
issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: 2 reports (9%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Owners mention persistent interior rattles. A minor complaint area.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 2 reports (9%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. One owner reported a low-oil-level warning. A minor complaint area.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 2 reports (9%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. One report describes an all-wheel-drive transfer failure under 7,000 miles. A minor complaint area.
